strengthBuckets.name: Data & Analytics
strengthBuckets.pitchLine: I bring a strong analytics foundation — from KPI design to SQL-based funnel analysis — and believe good decisions start with well-structured measurement.

strengthBuckets.name: Cross-functional Leadership
strengthBuckets.pitchLine: Driving alignment across engineering, product, marketing, and finance is where I've done my most impactful work — I'm most effective when the problem requires getting diverse stakeholders to a shared decision.

strengthBuckets.name: Domain Expertise
strengthBuckets.pitchLine: My domain sits at the intersection of marketplace operations and growth strategy — I've worked on the supply/demand balance, pricing levers, and the operational systems that sustain scale.

gapBuckets.name: Engineering / Technical
gapBuckets.framingLine: While I work closely with engineering and am comfortable with data tooling, I'm not a software engineer — I'd be joining as a non-technical partner.

gapBuckets.name: Finance / Accounting
gapBuckets.framingLine: I can build financial models and work from P&L data, but I don't have a finance or accounting background — this role may require more depth there than I have.

gapBuckets.name: Enterprise Sales
gapBuckets.framingLine: I've worked alongside sales teams and on GTM strategy, but I haven't carried a quota or been a practicing AE — this gap could matter if the role requires direct selling.
